blended.narrative: Waterville Valley is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 400 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.7" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: light rain showers, highs of 54°F.
Friday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
